page_content: LACS458 Senior Capstone Course in Latin American and Caribbean Studies (3 Credits) Capstone course for advanced students in the Latin American and Caribbean Studies Certiﬁcate Program or other students with appropriate preparation. Interdisciplinary topics will vary each semester. Prerequisite: LASC234 and LASC235; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department. Restriction: Must be in Latin American and Caribbean Studies Certiﬁcate program; and senior standing.
